english: We know the five-faced one, we meditate on the son of the Wind

hindi: ॐ हनुमते नमः। श्री पञ्चमुखहनुमते नमः।
english: Om, salutations to Hanuman. Salutations to the five-faced Hanuman
roman: Om Hanumate namah. Shri Panchamukha Hanumate namah

hindi: पूर्वे तु वानरो मुखं, दक्षिणे नारसिंहकम्।
english: In the east is the monkey face, in the south is the Narasimha face
roman: Purve tu Vanaro mukham daksine Narasimhakam

english: In the west is the Garuda face, in the north is the Varaha face
Above is the Hayagriva face — these five faces are offered in worship
roman: Urdhve Hayagrivam mukham pancha mukham samarpayaet

english: Whoever reads the five-faced Hanuman Kavach daily
roman: Panchamukha Hanumat kavacham yah pathet nityam

english: All fears are destroyed and all evil omens are pacified
roman: Sarva bhayam nashayati sarva arishNam shamayati
